title: Copy UUID
description: Simple mod that allow to Copy Entity UUID using stick.
body:
# Copy UUID

A simple utility mod that lets you copy any entity's UUID to your clipboard in one click — no commands, no F3 screen digging.

## Usage

1. Hold a **stick**
2. Right-click any entity
3. UUID is copied to your clipboard instantly ✅

A confirmation message will appear on your action bar showing the entity name and its UUID.

## Why?

UUID is useful for:
- `/data` and `/execute` commands targeting specific entities
- Map making and command blocks
- Server administration and debugging

## Compatibility

| Minecraft | Fabric API | Support |
|---|---|---|
| 1.21 – 26.x | Latest | ✅ |

## Requirements

- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
